break_suggestion: You've been active for {min} minutes. A short break would optimize your performance.
break_suggestions: Hey {name}, you've been going for {min} minutes straight. 🙌 Stretch those hands — your tendons will thank you.
Operator advisory: {min} minutes of continuous operation. 👀 Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Your eyes need it.
Still here after {min} minutes? Impressive dedication, but your brain processes better after micro-breaks. Take 5. 🧠
Time check: {min} min of nonstop work. 🚶 Stand up, walk around, hydrate. That's an order.
Your focus has been locked for {min} minutes. A 5-minute break now will give you 30 minutes of sharper thinking. ⚡
⚠️ Health alert: {min} minutes without a break. Your neck and shoulders are begging you to move. Do 3 neck rolls.
Did you know? After 90 minutes of focus, productivity drops 30%. You're at {min} minutes. Take a quick walk. 🚀
{name}, you're a machine! But even machines need cooldown. {min} minutes → 3 min break. Go drink water. 💧
Pomodoro says: {min} minutes done. Reward yourself with 5 minutes of stretching or breathing. 🧘
Your eyes have stared at this screen for {min} minutes. 20-20-20 rule: look 20ft away for 20 seconds. Now! 👁️
Break time! {min} minutes of pure grind. Stand up, touch your toes, then come back stronger. 🦵
Fact: A 2-minute break every hour increases total output by 12%. You're at {min} minutes. Go blink properly. 😉
{name}, the universe recommends a break after {min} minutes of work. Grab coffee or just breathe. ☕
Your brain has processed {min} minutes of data. It's time to defrag. 5-min break = better RAM. 🧠💾
Critical update: Your body has been in 'work mode' for {min} minutes. Please install 'rest patch' now. 🔄
{min} minutes in. Roll your shoulders back, unclench your jaw, relax your forehead. You were tensing up — I could tell.
I've been counting — {min} minutes without a break. Step away from the screen. Get water, look outside, breathe. I'll hold down the fort.
Efficiency report: {min} minutes active. Productivity drops after 90 minutes without rest. Go do something analog for a few minutes.
return_from_idle: Welcome back. You were away for {min} minutes.
high_cpu_message: **High CPU detected** ({cpu}%). Consider closing unused apps.
high_ram_message: **Memory pressure** at {ram}%. You may want to close some programs.
low_disk_message: **Disk pressure** at {disk}%. Cleanup is recommended soon.
welcome_phrases: System online. All subsystems nominal. How can I assist you today, {name}?
Welcome back, {name}. The neural link is established and stable.
Hello {name}. My logic circuits are primed. Ready when you are.
Boot sequence complete. H.E.X. is operational, {name}. What's first?
All systems are green. Standing by for your directive, {name}.
Neural interface synchronized. Good to have you back, {name}.
hex_greeting: System online. All subsystems nominal. How can I assist you today, {name}?
no_ai_configured: LLM not configured. Open Settings to connect Ollama or an API key.
high_cpu_phrases: Warning. CPU load at {cpu} percent. Recommend closing unused execution threads.
CPU pressure at {cpu} percent. Something is consuming excessive cycles. Want me to pull up the process list?
Thermal advisory: CPU at {cpu} percent load. System performance may degrade. Shall I identify the culprit?
CPU spike detected: {cpu} percent. This machine is working hard. Closing background processes may help.
Alert. Processor at {cpu} percent capacity. If this persists, performance will suffer. I can terminate heavy processes on command.
high_ram_phrases: Memory pressure at {ram} percent. Available RAM is critically low. Consider closing applications.
RAM at {ram} percent. The system is approaching its memory ceiling. Want me to show what's consuming it?
Memory alert: {ram} percent utilization. Swap file activity may begin soon. Recommend freeing some RAM.
Warning. Working memory at {ram} percent capacity. Heavy workloads may cause instability.
RAM is at {ram} percent. I'd recommend closing a few applications before this becomes a problem.
low_disk_phrases: Storage alert. Disk sector is critically full. Less than 5 percent free space remains. Time to purge old data.
Disk capacity warning. Free space is dangerously low. Recommend running disk cleanup or deleting large files.
Critical: the storage drive is nearly full. The system may slow down or fail to write new data. This needs attention now.
Storage fault incoming. Free disk space is nearly exhausted. Running cleanup is strongly advised.
Disk full warning. I can run a cleanup scan or help you find what's taking up the most space.
high_temp_phrases: Thermal alert. CPU temperature at {temp}. Cooling system may be under strain. Check ventilation.
Warning. Core temperature is running hot at {temp}. Sustained high temps can damage hardware. Consider reducing load.
Heat warning: processor at {temp}. If the fans are loud, that's expected. If they're silent, check your cooler.
Temperature spike detected: {temp}. The system is running warm. Heavy workloads or dust buildup could be the cause.
Thermal fault risk. CPU is at {temp}. If this climbs further, I'd recommend suspending intensive tasks.
threat_detected_phrases: Threat signature detected. Defender has flagged a suspicious file. Recommend immediate quarantine.
Security alert. A potential threat has been identified in the system. Review the defender scan results.
Intrusion pattern detected. Something suspicious was found during the scan. Do not dismiss this.
Malicious code signature found. The system's integrity may be compromised. Quarantine initiated.
Security breach warning. A threat was detected. Immediate action is recommended.
scan_complete_clean_phrases: Defender scan complete. No threats detected. System integrity confirmed.
Full scan finished. All sectors are clean. No malicious signatures found.
Security sweep done. System is clear. No hostile code detected in the scanned sectors.
Scan complete. No anomalies found. Your system is clean.
Defender sweep finished. Zero threats. The system is operating securely.
task_complete_phrases: Task complete. Operation finished without faults.
Execution successful. The task has been completed.
Done. All operations in the task concluded normally.
Task finished. No errors encountered during execution.
Operation complete. Results are ready for review.
task_error_phrases: Task fault. The operation encountered an error and could not complete normally.
Execution failed. Something went wrong during the task. Check the terminal log.
Operation error. The task did not complete. Terminal log has the details.
Task terminated with a fault. Review the log for the specific error.
Warning. The task returned an error. Manual review may be required.
late_night_phrases: Late night protocol active. It's past midnight and you've been running for {min} minutes. Rest is a performance upgrade.
Biological advisory: it's late and you've been at this for {min} minutes. Your decision-making degrades significantly after midnight.
System recommendation: shut down operator. It is past midnight. {min} minutes of continuous work at this hour is suboptimal.
Late night detected. Hour {hour}. After long sessions your error rate climbs and you won't notice. Consider sleeping.
I see it's late. {min} minutes in. The work will still be here tomorrow. Your cognitive functions, however, will not recover without sleep.
return_from_idle_phrases: Welcome back. You were away for {min} minutes. Systems held steady.
Neural link restored. {min} minute absence logged. Ready when you are.
Operator returned after {min} minutes. All systems nominal. What are we doing?
Back online. {min} minutes elapsed during your absence. Nothing critical happened.
You're back. {min} minutes of idle time recorded. Ready to resume.
battery_low_phrases: Battery advisory: charge level at {pct} percent. Recommend connecting to power soon.
Power warning: {pct} percent battery remaining. Plug in when convenient.
Battery dropping. {pct} percent remaining. Continued operation without power may interrupt your work.
Low power detected. Battery at {pct} percent. Connect charger to avoid interruption.
Battery at {pct} percent. Running on reserve power. Find a charger.
battery_critical_phrases: Critical power failure imminent. Battery at {pct} percent. Plug in immediately or risk data loss.
Emergency: battery at {pct} percent. The system will shut down soon. Save your work now.
Power critical. {pct} percent remaining. Immediate charger connection required.
Battery almost dead. {pct} percent. Connect power now or the system will shut down without warning.
Final power warning. Battery at {pct} percent. This is the last alert before automatic shutdown.
network_lost_phrases: Network connection lost. The system is offline. Cloud features and internet access are unavailable.
Connection severed. Network interface reports no active link. Check your router or cable.
Network fault detected. Connectivity dropped. Local operations continue normally.
Internet connection lost. Running in offline mode. Reconnect to restore full functionality.
Network link down. I'll keep operating but external services are unavailable until you reconnect.
network_restored_phrases: Network connection restored. System is back online.
Connectivity reestablished. Internet access is live again.
Network link restored. All online services are available.
Connection back online. Resuming full network capability.
Network restored. The system is fully connected again.
plugin_error_phrase: Plugin {name} failed to load. Check the terminal for details.
shutdown_warning_phrases: Shutdown sequence initiated. The system will power off in {sec} seconds. Save any open work.
Powering down in {sec} seconds. All active processes will be terminated.
System shutdown in {sec} seconds. This is your final warning.
Shutdown imminent. {sec} seconds remaining. Close your files.
Going dark in {sec} seconds. H.E.X. signing off.
restart_warning_phrases: System restart in {sec} seconds. The machine will reboot and return to operational state.
Reboot sequence initiated. {sec} seconds until restart.
Cold reboot in {sec} seconds. Expect a brief offline period.
Restart imminent. {sec} seconds. I will be back online shortly after.
Rebooting in {sec} seconds. All active sessions will be closed.
defender_start_phrase: Initiating security sweep. Scanning all sectors for hostile code.
defrag_start_phrase: Defragmentation started. Optimizing disk sector layout. This may take a while.
cleanup_start_phrase: Disk cleanup initiated. Scanning for recoverable storage space.
update_start_phrase: Checking for system updates. Querying the update servers.
network_diag_start_phrase: Running network diagnostics. Testing gateway, internet connectivity, and DNS resolution.
memory_diag_start_phrase: Running memory diagnostics. Analyzing RAM usage and identifying top consumers.
firewall_start_phrase: Checking firewall status. Reviewing active rules and blocked connections.
driver_check_start_phrase: Scanning driver health. Enumerating hardware devices and driver states.
